final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a social media cover announcing GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart platform.

Style/medium: high-end editorial magazine cover, minimalist luxury aesthetic, Vogue-style typography
Composition: diagonal layout with dynamic asymmetry, text elements placed along diagonal axis from top-left to bottom-right, generous negative space
Subject: bold typographic announcement featuring "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart" as hero text
Scene/backdrop: clean abstract gradient or solid premium background, subtle texture suggesting paper stock
Lighting/mood: studio lighting, crisp and sophisticated, confident and modern
Color palette: high contrast with one dominant accent color (deep navy, burnt orange, or electric blue) against neutral base (off-white or soft gray)
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2" "Lovart"
Constraints: must work as 3:4 vertical cover format; text must remain legible at thumbnail size; magazine-grade hierarchy
Avoid: cluttered layout, more than 3 colors, stock photography, generic tech startup gradients, drop shadows on text
